facts.statement: The Trans-Siberian Railway is under 8,000 km long
Construction on the Trans-Siberian Railway began over 200 years ago
facts.actual: Construction began on March 9, 1891, about 135 years ago

facts.statement: The Trans-Siberian Railway crosses fewer than 5 time zones
facts.actual: Crosses 7 time zones (Moscow at UTC+3 to Vladivostok at UTC+10)

facts.statement: A full journey on the Trans-Siberian Railway takes over 10 days
facts.actual: The full journey takes approximately 6 days

facts.statement: The Trans-Siberian Railway's maximum speed is over 200 km/h
